title: rubus iringanus
intro: Rubus iringanus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its thorny canes and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus iringanus include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to the presence of various polyphenolic compounds. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties, while also supporting digestive health and boosting the immune system. Rubus iringanus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
